markets_and_platforms.execution_environment: simulated evaluation, Express Funded, and Live Funded stages

company_level_rules.multiple_accounts_policy: multiple Trading Combines allowed under one Topstep profile; multiple profiles prohibited

execution_and_costs.order_execution_notes: Level 1 data is included in Trading Combine and Express Funded Account.
execution_and_costs.data_feed_provider: Level 1 top-of-book data included; Level 2 upgrade available for fee

risk_rules.daily_drawdown_based_on: Net P&L; optional in Trading Combine/Express Funded, automatic in Live Funded
risk_rules.max_drawdown_based_on: Maximum Loss Limit trails highest end-of-day balance and locks once it reaches starting balance
risk_rules.equity_or_balance_rule: Balance monitored in real time; realized and unrealized P&L count toward the limit
risk_rules.drawdown_trails_until: starting balance for Trading Combine; $0 for Express Funded Account

funded_stage_and_payouts.funded_account_type: Express Funded Account then Live Funded Account
funded_stage_and_payouts.simulated_or_live: evaluation and Express stage are not the same as Live Funded Account; Live stage uses live funded parameters

editorial_summary.main_strength: Clear official rules and mature futures funding structure with one primary account-failure rule.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Daily Loss Limit and live-stage rules differ by stage/platform and must be understood before trading.
best_for: futures traders who want structured evaluation
traders who prefer clear account-size tiers
not_suitable_for: traders who do not understand trailing/eod loss mechanics
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Disciplined futures trader focused on CME products and risk-controlled progression.

notes_for_human_review: Topstep official help confirms Trading Combine rule/objectives, max loss limits, daily loss limit settings, contract limits, and pricing paths. Profit targets still need checkout verification.

general_forbidden_practices: hedging evaluation accounts against each other

risk_rules.daily_drawdown_based_on: No daily max drawdown stated in legacy evaluation rules; current product variants may differ.
risk_rules.max_drawdown_based_on: Intraday trailing threshold based on peak balance/live account value
risk_rules.equity_or_balance_rule: Trailing threshold may follow highest live value/open equity depending on account type/platform
risk_rules.drawdown_trails_until: For some Rithmic evaluations threshold stops when it reaches profit target; Tradovate may not stop trailing.
risk_rules.max_loss_example: 50K legacy example: $2,500 drawdown threshold starts at $47,500

editorial_summary.main_strength: Very broad futures prop-firm presence with detailed official drawdown documentation.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Intraday trailing drawdown is dangerous for inexperienced traders and varies by account/platform.
best_for: experienced futures traders
traders comfortable with trailing threshold mechanics
not_suitable_for: beginners who cannot monitor open equity and drawdown in real time
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Active futures trader who understands Rithmic/Tradovate trailing-threshold behavior.

notes_for_human_review: Apex official help confirms intraday trailing drawdown mechanics, no daily max drawdown in legacy rules, and account/platform differences. Current checkout pricing should be rechecked.

risk_rules.max_drawdown_based_on: minimum account balance / EOD drawdown rules

editorial_summary.main_strength: Strong education/evaluation orientation with clearly documented Gauntlet Mini rules.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Rules are stricter and more structured than some newer instant-style futures firms.
best_for: traders who want structured futures evaluation
traders who value formal rules
not_suitable_for: traders seeking very loose rules or instant funding
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Futures trader who wants a rule-based evaluation pathway.

notes_for_human_review: Earn2Trade Help Center confirms Gauntlet Mini rules: minimum 10 trading days, daily loss, minimum account balance/EOD drawdown, approved trading times, consistency, and no copytrading.

markets_and_platforms.execution_environment: qualification account, master account, funded account

company_level_rules.refund_general_policy: no refunds after registering and using service

risk_rules.daily_drawdown_resets_at: 5:00 PM CT to 4:00 PM CT trading day
risk_rules.daily_drawdown_based_on: P&L including commissions and real-time/unrealized trades for Option 2 EOD accounts
risk_rules.max_drawdown_based_on: Option 1 trails current balance in real time; Option 2 uses end-of-day drawdown
risk_rules.equity_or_balance_rule: Option 1 includes realized and non-realized gains; Option 2 updates at EOD when balance reaches new high
risk_rules.drawdown_trails_until: Master Account trailing/EOD drawdown stops at initial starting balance + $100

funded_stage_and_payouts.profit_split_scaling: First $10,000 can be withdrawn without commission; after that up to 90% profits according to Bulenox public pages.

editorial_summary.main_strength: Offers both real-time trailing and EOD/scaling futures account structures.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Rules are complex; choosing the wrong drawdown option can materially change risk.
best_for: futures traders who understand drawdown types
traders wanting EOD option
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Futures trader who can choose between trailing and EOD drawdown consciously.

notes_for_human_review: Bulenox official pages confirm qualification account rules, Option 1 real-time trailing drawdown, Option 2 EOD/scaling/daily loss limit, payment methods, and account-tier examples. Prices may vary by coupon/checkout.

programs.program_description: Futures evaluation path leading to PRO account; PRO payout rules use an 80/20 split and buffer-zone requirements.

plans.payout_conditions: PRO account withdrawals require reaching the buffer zone equal to max drawdown amount; withdrawals inside buffer have special conditions.
PRO account withdrawals require reaching the buffer zone equal to max drawdown amount; withdrawals inside buffer have special conditions.

funded_stage_and_payouts.first_payout_requirements: PRO account withdrawals are possible day one after building the buffer zone.
funded_stage_and_payouts.profit_split_scaling: 80/20 profit split on PRO account; withdrawals require buffer zone rules.

editorial_summary.main_strength: Official help article documents PRO payout split and buffer-zone withdrawal logic.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Evaluation test pricing/risk rules need a separate complete official rules page for higher confidence.
best_for: futures traders focused on payout rules and buffer mechanics
not_suitable_for: traders who need simple payout rules without buffer constraints

missing_critical_fields: daily loss/max loss per account size
notes_for_human_review: Existing extracted fields mixed payout/commission semantics; corrected profit split and payout conditions from official help article.

programs.program_description: Direct To Funded skips evaluation and starts in Elite Sim-Funded with EOD or Static drawdown and swing trading allowed.

plans.trailing_drawdown_rules: EOD trails highest end-of-day balance until safety net condition, depending on selected DTF structure.

risk_rules.max_drawdown_based_on: EOD trailing drawdown for EOD/DTF plans or static drawdown for Static plan, depending on plan type.
risk_rules.floating_loss_counts: Open losses count intraday for EOD evaluation daily/max loss checks.
risk_rules.drawdown_trails_until: DTF EOD drawdown trails highest end-of-day balance until safety net is met; then starting balance + $100 becomes permanent minimum allowable balance.
risk_rules.max_loss_example: For $25K DTF account, safety net is max drawdown + $100.

editorial_summary.main_strength: Official help center documents DTF, Static and EOD plan mechanics with drawdown treatment.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Many plan sizes and prices require careful plan-by-plan extraction before publishing a full comparison.
best_for: futures traders comparing static, EOD and direct-to-funded paths
not_suitable_for: traders who want one simple rule set across all plans

general_forbidden_practices: hedging not allowed in live FAQ

funded_stage_and_payouts.funded_account_type: sim-funded account with live account transition criteria
funded_stage_and_payouts.minimum_payout_amount: Core/Scale: $250; Pro: $1,000 according to official payout overview
funded_stage_and_payouts.payout_processing_time: most payout requests approved instantly; manual review may take 6–12 business hours on weekdays
funded_stage_and_payouts.profit_split_scaling: Core/Scale/Pro 80% trader according to payout overview

editorial_summary.main_strength: Fast payout-oriented futures funding structure with explicit sim-to-live transition rules.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Plan lineup and names change often; current pricing and account parameters require checkout-level verification.
best_for: futures traders focused on payouts
traders who understand sim-funded/live transition
not_suitable_for: traders who need static rules that rarely change
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Futures trader who wants fast withdrawals but is willing to monitor changing plan rules.

notes_for_human_review: MyFundedFutures official help confirms payout structures, sim-funded/live transition, EOD trailing drawdown for Builder, and payout conditions. Current plan lineup/pricing should be checked from official checkout before publication.

programs.program_description: Official DayTraders pricing page shows 50K EOD discounted to $70.35 one-time, profit target $3,000, total drawdown $2,000, daily loss limit $1,250, 10 contracts, 8 qualifying days payout cadence in Pro+, and $130 activation fee.

important_notes: Official DayTraders pricing page shows 50K EOD discounted to $70.35 one-time, profit target $3,000, total drawdown $2,000, daily loss limit $1,250, 10 contracts, 8 qualifying days payout cadence in Pro+, and $130 activation fee.

programs.program_description: Official DayTraders pricing page shows 100K Static discounted to $65 one-time, profit target $5,750, static drawdown $1,500, no daily loss limit, 8 contracts, and $130 Pro activation fee.

plans.payout_conditions: Buffer fully built, $500+ above buffer, consistency within 25%, 5 winning days since last payout for Express MAX funded.

risk_rules.drawdown_trails_until: Express MAX funded trails unrealized until buffer built, then static

editorial_summary.main_strength: مركز المساعدة يقدم مواصفات دقيقة لـExpress OG/MAX وشروط السحب والاتساق والفائزين.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: الأنواع كثيرة وقد تختلف شروطها؛ يجب عرض OG وMAX بوضوح منفصل في الموقع.
best_for: متداول Futures يريد مسارات Express أو MAX واضحة
من يحتاج Same-day payout عند تحقق الشروط

plans.consistency_rule: No consistency rule after passing; Legacy has 40% consistency rule, Rapid no consistency rule per help article

editorial_summary.main_strength: Bolt official page يذكر 50K مقابل $99.99، news trading allowed، ولا consistency بعد اجتياز التحدي.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: الصفحات المتاحة هنا لا تكفي وحدها لإكمال كل تفاصيل السحب والدرو داون لكل برنامج Rapid/Legacy.
best_for: متداول Futures يريد Bolt مع دخول منخفض وتداول أخبار مسموح
not_suitable_for: من يحتاج تفاصيل كاملة لـRapid/Legacy قبل الشراء

plans.payout_frequency: per payment period; wallet/live rules apply
plans.commission: Rithmic/dxFeed commissions vary by instrument; ES/NQ examples $2.20 per side in official table.

editorial_summary.main_strength: صفحة القواعد الرسمية تعرض EOD drawdown، السحوبات، العمولات لكل أصل، وNews trading.

best_for: متداول Futures يريد قواعد منشورة بتفاصيل عمولات وأمثلة سحب
not_suitable_for: من يريد صفحة مقارنة مختصرة جدًا فقط

editorial_summary.main_strength: نموذج متعدد الأصول للأسهم والفيوتشرز، مع benchmark progression وReal Prop transition و80/20 profit split.

plans.payout_conditions: Profits must exceed buffer zone by at least $100 unless one-time buffer exception applies.

editorial_summary.main_strength: سياسة السحب الرسمية واضحة: buffer zone، نسب سحب تصاعدية من 60% إلى 100%، وسحب كل 14 يومًا عند تحقق الشروط.

programs.program_description: Futures Prime challenges with $50K, $100K and $150K accounts, one phase, published profit targets, EOD trailing max drawdown and 80% profit share.

plans.drawdown_calculation_notes: Maximum drawdown trails based on end-of-day balance until it reaches starting balance, then remains fixed.
plans.payout_conditions: First payout capped at lower of $5,000 or 50% of realized profit; 5 profitable days with at least $200/day required.
plans.scaling_plan: Earning account buying power scales based on end-of-day profit levels.

plans.copy_trading_details: Own accounts allowed within limits; copying from other traders prohibited.

copying between challenge and earning accounts

editorial_summary.main_strength: Clear Futures Prime account specifications with published prices, targets, drawdown and payout policy.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Some program rules differ between Prime/Classic and old account cohorts, so traders must verify the exact plan before purchase.
best_for: Futures traders who want listed exchange products and published challenge parameters.
not_suitable_for: Traders who need unlimited challenge duration on Futures Prime.
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Futures trader comfortable with EOD trailing drawdown and structured payout requirements.

notes_for_human_review: Verify whether user is buying Futures Prime or another TTP futures product because rules differ by program.

positive_signals: Official help center publishes payout rules for Sim Funded and brokerage accounts.

programs.program_description: Futures funding program with BluLive/Sim Funded/Brokerage path; payout details are officially documented in BluSky help center.

plans.payout_conditions: For standard Sim Funded/Brokerage accounts, no minimum days to request payouts as long as account is above starting balance by at least $250; one meaningful profitable day between payout requests is required.
important_notes: Payouts before 11AM ET on eligible weekdays can be processed same day; transfer timing depends on payout method/bank.
Direct 2 Funded has separate 21% consistency and profit split rules.

risk_rules.daily_drawdown_based_on: Program-specific; Direct 2 Funded has daily limit and negative day allowance rules.
risk_rules.equity_or_balance_rule: Program-specific; Sim Funded requires remaining above minimum account balance for payouts.

funded_stage_and_payouts.first_payout_requirements: No minimum days for standard payouts as long as account is above starting balance by at least $250; specific account programs may add caps/consistency rules.
funded_stage_and_payouts.payout_processing_time: Same-day processing for weekday payout requests before 11AM ET; transfer can take 1-3 business days.
funded_stage_and_payouts.profit_split_scaling: 90% trader / 10% BluSky for standard payouts; Direct 2 Funded can start 50/50 then move to 80/20 after 30 trading days.

editorial_summary.main_strength: Daily payout processing and clear published payout policy for funded accounts.
editorial_summary.main_weakness: Program-specific rules and payout caps require careful reading before choosing between standard and Direct 2 Funded paths.
best_for: Futures traders prioritizing frequent payouts and 90/10 standard profit split.
not_suitable_for: Traders unwilling to manage consistency rules and account-specific payout caps.
editorial_summary.ideal_trader_profile: Active futures trader seeking frequent cash-out opportunities after passing the BluLive/Sim Funded path.

missing_critical_fields: full pricing table from official public page
complete evaluation account rules by plan
notes_for_human_review: Official payout sources are strong; account pricing/rules should be verified from BluSky dashboard or current public plans page before marking ready.
